Name: Approve Supplier Invoice
_name_note: Starts with a verb (Approve). Per Nintex Technique 3: all process names must start with a verb.
Objective: Ensure all supplier invoices are reviewed, approved, and processed accurately within agreed payment terms.
Background: Applies to all invoices received from third-party suppliers. Internal cost transfers follow a separate process. This process begins when an invoice is received and ends when payment is confirmed.
